content.raw_text: Neon Edge | Module 7: DAOs (Attribution) Goal: Organize/Change -> Viz: Toggle Selectors. 2. Attribution Flow -> Goal: Relationship -> Viz: HTML Nodes & Flex Lines. 3. Tome of Law -> Goal: Inform -> Viz: Sidebar. Confirming NO SVG/Mermaid. --> DAOs: Code as Law Chapter 7: The Problem of Attribution Smart Contract v1.0.4 🔧 Attribution HUD The Attribution Problem Can a decentralized protocol be a "legal person"? Without formal registration, the law often treats DAOs as unincorporated associations . RUPA § 202 Default If two or more persons associate for profit without a formal charter, they are a General Partnership , regardless of the technology used. Incident Log Structure-Bot #402 mistakenly identified a resident's balcony as "debris." The balcony was dismantled. The resident is suing for 20,000 credits. I. The Attribution Console Review the Structure-Bot DAO configuration. Your task is to determine if the bot's tort (damage) is attributed to an entity or the founders. Step 1: Inspect Smart Contract function executeRepair(targetId) {   if (target.integrity     deploy_dismantle_unit();   } } // WARNING: Biometric check missing. Step 2: Legal Wrapper Status Unincorporated (Raw Code) LLC Wrapper (Wyoming/Statutory) Liability Attribution Flow 🤖 Structure-Bot ☁ DAO Entity 👥 Founders (Z & S) Attribution: DIRECT PERSONAL LIABILITY. In the absence of a legal wrapper, the DAO is an unincorporated partnership. II. Final Conclusion "The resident's claim for damages must be ... Dismissed Attributed beyond the code. Because the DAO lacked a ... Legal Wrapper (Entity Status) Faster CPU , the Council views the association as a ... Corporation General Partnership under RUPA. Consequently, the bot's actions are attributed ... Personally to the Founders Only to the Code under the doctrine of Respondeat Superior." Commit Final Verdict Acknowledge
